title: solidDryer operation
description: Contact / through-circulation solid dryer.  One inlet (a wet solid: crystals in s[] carrying bound moisture) and two outlets (dry solid + vapour).  The unit dries the solid toward the EQUILIBRIUM moisture set by the air's relative humidity and the solid's GAB sorption isotherm (a sample-specific `sorption {}` block on the component.dat).  X_final = min(X_in, X_eq); the water removed, the duty and the equilibrium moisture are RESULTS.  Complements the spray dryer: spray = atomise a liquid into powder; solidDryer = polish an already-solid powder down to spec.

airTemperature.title: Drying-air temperature
airTemperature.description: Temperature of the drying air.  Hotter air lowers the equilibrium moisture the solid can reach (the isotherm shifts).

relativeHumidity.title: Drying-air relative humidity
relativeHumidity.description: Relative humidity (water activity) of the drying air, 0-1.  The solid dries until its surface water activity equals this; the GAB isotherm then fixes the equilibrium moisture X_eq.  Drier air (lower RH) -> lower X_eq -> a drier product.
